variants.title: Donaldson P784015 Air Panel
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P784015 Air Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Air Panel, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Length: 318.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011

variants.title: Mann Filter C 32 338/1 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P784015
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 32 338/1 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P784015
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 315.0 mm, Dimension B: 277.0 mm, Dimension H: 80.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011, Length: 318.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25319 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the Donaldson P784015
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25319 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the Donaldson P784015
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25319 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
specifications: Style: Air Panel, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Length: 318.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011
